summary: QA phase executed for iter-3 (Tracking Completo + SOS + Organizer Controls + Mapbox Migration). Test catalog TC-3-1 through TC-3-21 created. dart analyze 0 errors/0 warnings (3 Mapbox SDK info-level deprecations acceptable). flutter test 43 pass, 1 pre-existing failure (TC-2-28 rider email from iter-2, unrelated). CRITICAL BLOCKER: widget test for route_map_preview.dart does not exist. This is a hard gate per T-3-11 / architect-for-qa.md. BUG-3-1 filed. Sign-off: BLOCKED until frontend creates and passes widget test before Story 3.0 PR merges.

blockers.title: CRITICAL: Widget test for route_map_preview.dart hard gate
blockers.description: Widget test for route_map_preview.dart must be created and passing before Story 3.0 PR can merge. This is a non-negotiable hard gate per T-3-11 / architect-for-qa.md. Test file location: test/shared/widgets/map/route_map_preview_test.dart. Expected: 4 test cases using mocktail to stub PlaceService.geocode(): (1) loading state — spinner overlay visible, (2) error state — error banner rendered no crash, (3) data state — MapWidget rendered with valid coordinates, (4) empty state — placeholder text visible. Status: backlog. Assigned to: frontend.

deferredAcceptanceCriteria.ac: Physical device background GPS logs (Android + iOS)
deferredAcceptanceCriteria.reason: Manual testing required on real devices; emulator cannot simulate foreground service (Android) or background location (iOS). Deferred to manual validation phase.
Requires 2 physical devices + WebSocket connection to real backend. Backend contract confirmed; manual testing deferred.
Task T-3-9 deferred to backlog; GeoJSON route rendering not implemented in frontend. Related AC deferred.

nextPhaseReason: Cannot proceed to DevOps phase until BUG-3-1 is resolved. Frontend must create widget test for route_map_preview.dart and ensure it passes before Story 3.0 PR merges. Re-run full QA after widget test passes.
signOff: RED — BLOCKED on hard gate BUG-3-1. All static/dynamic quality gates PASS except hard_gate_cleared. Widget test requirement is non-negotiable per architect-for-qa.md T-3-11. Frontend agent: create test/shared/widgets/map/route_map_preview_test.dart with 4 test cases (loading/error/data/empty) using mocktail PlaceService stub. After test passes, re-run flutter test and return for final sign-off.
